## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win3x\theme.css`:

```css
:root {
  --preferred-font: "Microsoft Sans Serif";
  --desktop-bg: #C0C0C0;
  --workspace-bg: #FFFFFF;
  --window-bg: #FFFFFF;
  --window-fg: #000000;
  --button-bg: #C0C0C0;
  --button-fg: #000000;
  --button-dark: #808080;
  --button-light: #FFFFFF;
  --input-bg: var(--window-bg);
  --input-fg: var(--window-fg);
  --border: #000000;
  --disabled: #808080;
  --window-frame: #C0C0C0;
  --window-frame-active: var(--window-frame);
  --menu-bg: #FFFFFF;
  --menu-fg: #000000;
  --title-bar-bg: #FFFFFF;
  --title-bar-fg: #000000;
  --title-bar-active-bg: #0000C0;
  --title-bar-active-fg: #FFFFFF;
  --selection-bg: #0000C0;
  --selection-fg: #FFFFFF;
  --selection-inverse: #FFFF3F;
  --scrollbar-bg: #C0C0C0;
}

body {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
  font-family: system-ui;
}

*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

button::-moz-focus-inner {
  border: none;
}

button, input, textarea, select {
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
}

a:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--border);
}

code {
  font-family: monospace;
}

.desktop {
  background: var(--desktop-bg);
}

.raised {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.lowered {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.raised > .lowered {
  border: 0;
}

.raised.stack-row > .lowered + .lowered {
  border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.raised.stack-column > .lowered + .lowered {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.top-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.right-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.bottom-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.left-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
}

fieldset {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  position: relative;
}

legend {
  text-align: left;
  padding: 0 2px;
  display: block;
}

hr {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.horizontal-scrollbar,
.vertical-scrollbar {
  display: flex;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button,
.vertical-scrollbar > button {
  display: flex;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background: #C0C0C0;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px var(--button-light), inset -2px -2px var(--button-dark);
  border-radius: 0;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button::after, .horizontal-scrollbar > button:active::after,
.vertical-scrollbar > button::after,
.vertical-scrollbar > button:active::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  margin: 3px 0 0 3px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  position: initial;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button:focus,
.vertical-scrollbar > button:focus {
  outline: none;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button:focus::after,
.vertical-scrollbar > button:focus::after {
  position: initial;
  border: unset;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button:not(:disabled):active,
.vertical-scrollbar > button:not(:disabled):active {
  padding: 1px 0 0 1px;
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px var(--button-dark);
  outline: none;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track,
.vertical-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track {
  flex-grow: 1;
  background: var(--scrollbar-bg);
  position: relative;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb,
.vertical-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb {
  position: absolute;
  background: var(--button-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px var(--button-light), inset -2px -2px var(--button-dark);
}

.horizontal-scrollbar > button:first-child::after {
  background-image: url(scroll-left.svg);
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button:last-child::after {
  background-image: url(scroll-right.svg);
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb {
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  border-top: 0;
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.vertical-scrollbar {
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 16px;
}
.vertical-scrollbar > button:first-child::after {
  background-image: url(scroll-up.svg);
}
.vertical-scrollbar > button:last-child::after {
  background-image: url(scroll-down.svg);
}
.vertical-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track {
  border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.vertical-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb {
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  border-left: 0;
  border-right: 0;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar {
  background-color: var(--scrollbar-bg);
  width: 17px;
  height: 17px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {
  background: var(--scrollbar-bg);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button,
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  color: var(--button-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--button-light), inset -2px -2px var(--button-dark);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-track-piece {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button {
  width: 17px;
  height: 17px;
  display: none;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:single-button {
  display: block;
  background-position: 4px 4px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:active {
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px var(--button-dark);
  background-position: 5px 5px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:decrement {
  background-image: url(scroll-up.svg);
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  border-bottom: 0;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:increment {
  background-image: url(scroll-down.svg);
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  border-top: 0;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal:decrement {
  background-image: url(scroll-left.svg);
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  border-right: 0;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal:increment {
  background-image: url(scroll-right.svg);
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  border-left: 0;
}

button, input[type=button], input[type=submit], input[type=reset], .button {
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  color: var(--button-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 2.5px;
  min-width: 70px;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  position: relative;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--button-dark), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--button-light), inset -2px -2px 0 var(--button-dark), inset 2px 2px 0 var(--button-light);
  outline: none;
  cursor: default;
  user-select: none;
  text-align: center;
}
button:focus, button.focus, input[type=button]:focus, input[type=button].focus, input[type=submit]:focus, input[type=submit].focus, input[type=reset]:focus, input[type=reset].focus, .button:focus, .button.focus {
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--border), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--border), inset -2px -2px 0 var(--button-dark), inset 2px 2px 0 var(--button-light), inset -3px -3px 0 var(--button-dark), inset 3px 3px 0 var(--button-light);
}
button:focus::after, button.focus::after, input[type=button]:focus::after, input[type=button].focus::after, input[type=submit]:focus::after, input[type=submit].focus::after, input[type=reset]:focus::after, input[type=reset].focus::after, .button:focus::after, .button.focus::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  top: 3px;
  bottom: 3px;
  left: 6px;
  right: 6px;
  border: 1px dotted var(--button-dark);
  border-radius: 1px;
}
button:disabled::after, button.disabled::after, input[type=button]:disabled::after, input[type=button].disabled::after, input[type=submit]:disabled::after, input[type=submit].disabled::after, input[type=reset]:disabled::after, input[type=reset].disabled::after, .button:disabled::after, .button.disabled::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  top: 3px;
  left: 3px;
  right: 3px;
  bottom: 3px;
  background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--button-bg) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--button-bg) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--button-bg) 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--button-bg) 75%);
  background-size: 2px 2px;
  background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
}
button:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, button.active, input[type=button]:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, input[type=button].active, input[type=submit]:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, input[type=submit].active, input[type=reset]:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, input[type=reset].active, .button:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, .button.active {
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--border), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--border), inset 2px 2px 0 var(--button-dark);
  padding: 3px 7px 1px 9px;
}
button:not(:disabled, .disabled):active::after, button.active::after, input[type=button]:not(:disabled, .disabled):active::after, input[type=button].active::after, input[type=submit]:not(:disabled, .disabled):active::after, input[type=submit].active::after, input[type=reset]:not(:disabled, .disabled):active::after, input[type=reset].active::after, .button:not(:disabled, .disabled):active::after, .button.active::after {
  top: 4px;
  bottom: 2px;
  left: 31px;
  right: 29px;
}

input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range]), textarea, .input,
select {
  background-color: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--input-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 2px 6px;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
  outline: none;
}
input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range])::selection, textarea::selection, .input::selection,
select::selection {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}
input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range]):disabled, input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range]).disabled, textarea:disabled, textarea.disabled, .input:disabled, .input.disabled,
select:disabled,
select.disabled {
  color: var(--disabled);
}

select > option {
  padding: 2px 6px;
}
select > option:checked {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}

select[multiple], select[size]:not([size="1"]) {
  padding: 0;
}
select[multiple] > option:checked, select[size]:not([size="1"]) > option:checked {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}
select[multiple]:focus > option:checked, select[size]:not([size="1"]):focus > option:checked {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
}

select:not([size]):not(:active):focus,
select[size="1"]:not(:active):focus {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--input-bg), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--input-bg);
}

.dropdown {
  display: inline-grid;
  padding: 0;
  grid-template-areas: "s";
}
.dropdown > select {
  appearance: none;
  grid-area: s;
  padding-right: 21px;
}
.dropdown > select:not(:disabled):active {
  background: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--input-fg);
}
.dropdown > select:not(:disabled):active + .dropdown-button {
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px var(--button-dark), -1px 0 var(--input-bg);
}
.dropdown > select:not(:disabled):active + .dropdown-button::after {
  margin: 1px 0 0 2px;
}
.dropdown > select:disabled + .dropdown-button {
  color: var(--disabled);
}
.dropdown > .dropdown-button {
  justify-self: end;
  grid-area: s;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  margin: 1px;
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  color: var(--button-fg);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px var(--button-light), inset -2px -2px var(--button-dark), -1px 0 var(--input-bg);
  width: 16px;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.dropdown > .dropdown-button::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 7px;
  height: 9px;
  -webkit-mask-image: url(dropdown-arrow.svg);
  -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  mask-image: url(dropdown-arrow.svg);
  mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  background: currentColor;
}

input[type=checkbox] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  background: var(--input-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--input-fg);
  width: 13px;
  height: 13px;
  border-radius: 0;
}
input[type=checkbox]:checked {
  background-image: url(checkmark.svg);
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: 0 0;
}

input[type=checkbox]:disabled + label,
input[type=radio]:disabled + label {
  position: relative;
}
input[type=checkbox]:disabled + label::after,
input[type=radio]:disabled + label::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--window-bg) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--window-bg) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--window-bg) 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--window-bg) 75%);
  background-size: 2px 2px;
  background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
}

input[type=radio] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  background: var(--input-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--input-fg);
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
}
input[type=radio]:checked::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 6px;
  height: 6px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background-color: var(--input-fg);
  margin-top: 2px;
  margin-left: 2px;
}

input[type=radio]:focus,
input[type=checkbox]:focus {
  outline: none;
}
input[type=radio]:focus + label,
input[type=checkbox]:focus + label {
  position: relative;
}
input[type=radio]:focus + label::after,
input[type=checkbox]:focus + label::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: calc(var(--spacing) - 1px);
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  border: 1px dotted var(--border);
  border-radius: 1px;
}

label > input[type=radio]:focus,
label > input[type=checkbox]:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--border);
  outline-offset: 1px;
}

input[type=range] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  width: 100%;
  background: transparent;
  padding: 2px;
}
input[type=range]:focus {
  outline: none;
}
input[type=range]:focus::-moz-range-thumb {
  animation: 1s infinite linear range-focus;
}
input[type=range]:focus::-webkit-slider-thumb {
  animation: 1s infinite linear range-focus;
}
input[type=range]::-moz-range-track {
  height: 16px;
  background: var(--scrollbar-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}
input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
  border-radius: 0;
  height: 16px;
  width: 32px;
  background: var(--button-bg);
  background-size: 2px 2px;
  background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px var(--button-light), inset -2px -2px var(--button-dark);
}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
  height: 16px;
  background: var(--scrollbar-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  margin: 10px 0;
}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  margin-top: -1px;
  border-radius: 0;
  height: 16px;
  width: 32px;
  background: var(--button-bg);
  background-size: 2px 2px;
  background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px var(--button-light), inset -2px -2px var(--button-dark);
}

@keyframes range-focus {
  from {
    background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--button-dark) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--button-dark) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--button-dark) 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--button-dark) 75%);
  }
  to {
    background-image: none;
  }
}
progress,
.progress-bar {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  background: var(--input-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  height: 16px;
}

.progress-bar {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.progress-bar:not([aria-valuenow])::after, .progress-bar > .progress-bar-value {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  background: var(--selection-bg);
}
.progress-bar:not([aria-valuenow])::after {
  width: 50%;
  animation: 1s infinite linear indeterminate;
}

progress::-webkit-progress-bar {
  background: var(--input-bg);
}

progress::-webkit-progress-value {
  background: var(--selection-bg);
}

progress::-moz-progress-bar {
  background: var(--selection-bg);
}

progress:indeterminate::-moz-progress-bar {
  width: 50%;
  animation: 1s infinite linear indeterminate;
}

progress:not([value])::-webkit-progress-value {
  width: 50%;
  animation: 1s infinite linear indeterminate;
}

@keyframes indeterminate {
  from {
    margin-left: -50%;
  }
  to {
    margin-left: 100%;
  }
}
.window,
.dialog,
.menu {
  background: var(--window-frame);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  position: relative;
  padding: 2px;
}

.window.maximized,
.dialog.maximized {
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
}

.window.active,
.window:focus-within {
  background-color: var(--window-frame-active);
}

.dialog {
  background: var(--title-bar-bg);
}

.dialog.active,
.dialog:focus-within {
  background-color: var(--title-bar-active-bg);
}

.title-bar {
  background: var(--title-bar-bg);
  color: var(--title-bar-fg);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  font-weight: bold;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.dialog > .title-bar {
  border: 1px solid var(--window-bg);
  border-bottom-color: var(--border);
}

.title-bar-text {
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: bold;
  padding: 2px 4px;
  flex-grow: 1;
  cursor: default;
}

.title-bar-buttons {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.title-bar-buttons button {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 24px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0;
  border: 0;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 0;
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: 7px 8px;
}

.title-bar-buttons button::after {
  display: none;
}

.title-bar-buttons:first-child button {
  border: 0;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.title-bar-buttons button:active {
  outline: none;
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--button-dark);
  background-position: 8px 10px;
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-close] {
  background-image: url(close.svg);
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-minimize] {
  background-image: url(minimize.svg);
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize] {
  background-image: url(maximize.svg);
}

.maximized .title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize] {
  background-image: url(restore.svg);
}

.window-body,
.dialog-body {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-top: 0;
}

.dialog-body {
  border-color: var(--window-bg);
}

.window.active > .title-bar,
.window:focus-within > .title-bar,
.dialog.active > .title-bar,
.dialog:focus-within > .title-bar,
.menu > .title-bar,
.title-bar.active {
  background: var(--title-bar-active-bg);
  color: var(--title-bar-active-fg);
}

.window-body > * + *,
.dialog-body > * + * {
  border: 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}

[role=menu] {
  color: var(--menu-fg);
  background-color: var(--menu-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}
[role=menu] li {
  padding: 1px 3px 1px 16px;
}
[role=menu] li[data-shortcut]::after {
  float: right;
  content: attr(data-shortcut);
  display: block;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
[role=menu] li > ul {
  left: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  top: -1px;
  min-width: 200px;
}
[role=menu] li[role=separator] {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  height: 0;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 2px 0;
}
[role=menu] li[role=checkbox][aria-checked=true]::before, [role=menu] li[role=radio][aria-checked=true]::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 4px;
  top: 50%;
  margin-top: -5px;
  display: block;
  width: 8px;
  height: 10px;
  background: currentColor;
  -webkit-mask-image: url(menu-checkmark.svg);
  -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  -webkit-mask-size: 8px 10px;
  mask-image: url(menu-checkmark.svg);
  mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  mask-size: 8px 10px;
}
[role=menu] li[aria-haspopup=true] {
  position: relative;
}
[role=menu] li[aria-haspopup=true]:after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  right: 8px;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 4px;
  background: currentColor;
  -webkit-mask-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
  -webkit-mask-size: 4px 7px;
  -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  -webkit-mask-position: center center;
  mask-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
  mask-size: 4px 7px;
  mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  mask-position: center center;
}

[role=menubar] {
  color: var(--menu-fg);
  background-color: var(--menu-bg);
}
[role=menubar] > li {
  padding: 1px 8px;
}
[role=menubar] > li > ul {
  left: 0;
  top: 100%;
  min-width: 200px;
}

.menu > [role=menu] {
  border-top: 0;
}

[role=menu] li:focus,
[role=menubar] li:focus {
  outline: none;
}
[role=menu] li:focus-within,
[role=menubar] li:focus-within {
  background: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}
[role=menu] li[aria-disabled],
[role=menubar] li[aria-disabled] {
  color: var(--disabled);
  border-color: transparent;
}

.tabs > menu {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  margin: 0 2px;
}

.tabs > menu > button {
  border-bottom: 0;
  border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
  border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 2px 10px 2px 10px;
  box-shadow: inset -1px 0 0 var(--button-dark), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--button-light), inset -2px 0 0 var(--button-dark), inset 2px 2px 0 var(--button-light);
}

.tabs > menu > button:focus,
.tabs > menu > button:active {
  padding: 2px 10px 2px 10px;
}

.tabs > menu > button:focus:after {
  left: 8px;
  right: 8px;
}

.tabs > menu > button[aria-selected=true] {
  margin-right: -2px;
  margin-left: -2px;
  margin-top: -2px;
  margin-bottom: -1px;
  padding: 0px 12px 4px 12px;
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
  box-shadow: none;
  z-index: 1;
}

.tabs > [role=tabpanel] {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.list {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  overflow: auto;
  cursor: default;
}

.list > [role=option] {
  padding: 2px 6px 2px 6px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.list > [role=option][aria-selected=true] {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}

.list > [role=option]:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--border);
  outline-offset: -1px;
}

.list > [role=option][aria-selected=true]:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
}

.icon-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, 128px);
  flex-direction: row;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.icon-grid > .icon {
  flex: 0 0 128px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  margin: 4px;
}

.icon-grid > .icon > .icon-label {
  margin-top: 5px;
  text-align: center;
}

.icon-grid > .icon:focus {
  outline: none;
}

.icon-grid > .icon:focus > .icon-label {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--border);
  outline-offset: -1px;
}

.icon-grid > .icon[aria-selected=true] > .icon-label {
  outline: 1px solid var(--selection-bg);
}

.icon-grid:focus-within > .icon[aria-selected=true] > .icon-label {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
  outline: none;
}

.icon-grid > .icon[aria-selected=true]:focus > .icon-label {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
}

.detailed {
  width: 100%;
  border-spacing: 0;
}

.detailed th {
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: bold;
  padding: 2px 6px 2px 6px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.detailed tr {
  outline: none;
}

.detailed tr:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--border);
  outline-offset: -1px;
}

.detailed tr[aria-selected=true] {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}

.detailed tr[aria-selected=true]:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
}

.detailed .icon:focus .icon-label {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--border);
  outline-offset: -1px;
}

.detailed .icon[aria-selected=true] .icon-label {
  outline: 1px solid var(--selection-bg);
}

.detailed:focus-within .icon[aria-selected=true] .icon-label {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
  outline: none;
}

.detailed .icon[aria-selected=true]:focus .icon-label {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
}

.detailed td {
  padding: 2px 6px 2px 6px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.detailed .icon {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  outline: none;
}

.detailed td.icon {
  display: flex;
}

.detailed .icon > img {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  margin-right: 1px;
  margin-left: -4px;
}

.detailed .icon > .icon-label {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 1px 3px;
}

.detailed thead {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
}
```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\_buttons.scss`:

```scss
@use '../../util/util';

#{util.$buttons} {
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  color: var(--button-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  padding: 3px 10px 6px 10px;
  min-width: 75px;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 1;
  cursor: default;
  user-select: none;

  &:focus, &.focus {
    border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
    outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
    box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--darkest),
    inset -2px -2px 0 var(--dark);
    outline-offset: -4px;
  }

  &:disabled, &.disabled {
    color: var(--dark);
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
  }

  &:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, &.active {
    border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
    box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--dark), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
    padding: 4px 9px 5px 11px;
  }
}


```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\_inputs.scss`:

```scss
@use '../../util/util';

#{util.$textInputs},
select,
.dropdown {
  background-color: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--input-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light);
  padding: 2px 6px;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
  outline: none;

  &::selection {
    background-color: var(--selection-bg);
    color: var(--selection-fg);
  }

  &[readonly], &.readonly {
    background: var(--window-bg);
  }

  &:disabled, &.disabled {
    background: var(--window-bg);
    color: var(--dark);
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
  }
}

#{util.$multiSelects} {
  padding: 1px;

  & > option {
    padding: 2px 6px;

    &:checked {
      background-color: var(--window-bg);
      color: var(--window-fg);
    }
  }

  &:focus > option:checked {
    outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
    background-color: var(--selection-bg);
    color: var(--selection-fg);
  }
}

#{util.$singleSelects}:not(:active):focus {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light),
    inset 2px 2px 0 var(--input-bg), inset -2px -2px 0 var(--input-bg);
}

.dropdown {
  display: inline-grid;
  padding: 0;
  grid-template-areas: 's';

  & > select {
    appearance: none;
    grid-area: s;
    padding-right: 21px;

    &:not(:disabled):active {
      background: var(--input-bg);
      color: var(--input-fg);

      & + .dropdown-button {
        border: 1px solid var(--dark);
        box-shadow: none;
        margin: 2px 0 0 1px;
      }
    }

    &:disabled {
      & + .dropdown-button {
        box-shadow: inset -1px -1px var(--dark), inset 1px 1px var(--lightest);
        &::after {
          background: var(--dark);
          filter: drop-shadow(1px 1px var(--lightest));
        }
      }
    }
  }

  & > .dropdown-button {
    justify-self: end;
    grid-area: s;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 1px;
    background-color: var(--button-bg);
    color: var(--button-fg);
    border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--light);
    border-left: 1px solid var(--light);
    box-shadow: inset -1px -1px var(--dark), inset 1px 1px var(--lightest), -1px 0 var(--input-bg);
    width: 16px;
    pointer-events: none;

    &::after {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 7px;
      height: 4px;
      -webkit-mask-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
      -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      mask-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
      mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      background: #000;
    }
  }
}

input[type=checkbox] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  background: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--darkest);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light);
  width: 13px;
  height: 13px;
  border-radius: 0;

  &:active, &:disabled, &.active, &.disabled {
    background: var(--window-bg);
  }

  &:checked, &.checked {
    &::after {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 7px;
      height: 7px;
      margin: 2px 0 0 2px;
      background: currentColor;
      -webkit-mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
      -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      -webkit-mask-size: 7px 7px;
      mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
      mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      mask-size: 7px 7px;
    }
  }

  &:disabled, &.disabled {
    color: var(--dark);
  }

  &:disabled + label, &.disabled + label {
    color: var(--dark);
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
  }
}

input[type=radio] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  background: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--darkest);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light);
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;

  &:active, &:disabled, &.active, &.disabled {
    background: var(--window-bg);
  }

  &:checked::after, &.checked::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 4px;
    height: 4px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background-color: currentColor;
    margin-top: 3px;
    margin-left: 3px;
  }

  &:disabled, &.disabled {
    color: var(--dark);
  }

  &:disabled + label, &.disabled + label {
    color: var(--dark);
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
  }
}

input[type=checkbox],
input[type=radio] {
  &:focus, &.focus {
    outline: none;

    & + label {
      position: relative;
      &::after {
        content: '';
        display: block;
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: calc(var(--spacing) - 1px);
        right: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        border: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
        border-radius: 1px;
      }
    }
  }
}

label > input[type=radio],
label > input[type=checkbox] {
  &:focus, &.focus {
    outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
    outline-offset: 1px;
  }
}

@mixin range-track {
  height: 2px;
  background: var(--light);
  border: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--dark);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest);
  margin: 0 5px;
}

@mixin range-thumb {
  border-radius: 0;
  background: var(--button-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  width: 11px;
  height: 21px;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);

  &:active {
    background-color: var(--window-bg);
    background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%);
    background-size: 2px 2px;
    background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
  }
}

input[type=range] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  width: 100%;
  background: transparent; 
  padding: 2px;

  &:focus {
    outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
  }

  &::-moz-range-track {
    @include range-track;
  }

  &::-moz-range-thumb {
    @include range-thumb;
  }

  &::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
    @include range-track;
    margin: 10px 5px;
  }

  &::-webkit-slider-thumb {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    margin-top: -11px;
    @include range-thumb;
  }
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\_lists.scss`:

```scss
.list {
  background: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--input-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darker), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light);
  padding: 1px;
  overflow: auto;
  cursor: default;

  & > [role="option"] {
    padding: 2px 6px 2px 6px;
    white-space: nowrap;

    &[aria-selected="true"] {
      background-color: var(--window-bg);
      color: var(--window-fg);
    }

    &:focus {
      outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
      outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    &[aria-selected="true"]:focus {
      outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
    }
  }

  &:focus-within > [role="option"][aria-selected="true"] {
    background-color: var(--selection-bg);
    color: var(--selection-fg);
  }
}

.icon-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, 128px);
  flex-direction: row;
  flex-wrap: wrap;

  & > .icon {
    flex: 0 0 128px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 4px;


    & > .icon-label {
      margin-top: 5px;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 1px 1px;
    }

    &:focus {
      outline: none;
      & > .icon-label {
        outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
        outline-offset: -1px;
      }
    }

    &[aria-selected="true"] {
      & > .icon-label {
        background-color: var(--window-bg);
        color: var(--window-fg);
      }
      &:focus > .icon-label {
        outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
      }
    }
  }

  &:focus-within > .icon[aria-selected="true"] > .icon-label {
    background-color: var(--selection-bg);
    color: var(--selection-fg);
  }
}

.detailed {
  width: 100%;
  border-spacing: 0;


  th {
    text-align: left;
    font-weight: normal;
    background-color: var(--button-bg);
    color: var(--button-fg);
    border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
    border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
    box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
    padding: 2px 6px 2px 6px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  tr {
    outline: none;

    &:focus {
      outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
      outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    &[aria-selected="true"] {
      background-color: var(--window-bg);
      color: var(--window-fg);

      &:focus {
        outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
      }
    }
  }

  &:focus-within tr[aria-selected="true"] {
    background-color: var(--selection-bg);
    color: var(--selection-fg);
  }

  &:focus-within .icon[aria-selected="true"] .icon-label {
    background-color: var(--selection-bg);
    color: var(--selection-fg);
  }

  td {
    padding: 2px 6px 2px 6px;
    white-space: nowrap;

    &.icon {
      display: flex;
    }
  }

  .icon {
    display: inline-flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    align-items: center;
    outline: none;

    & > img {
      width: 16px;
      height: 16px;
      margin-right: 1px;
      margin-left: -4px;
    }

    & > .icon-label {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 1px 3px;
    }

    &:focus .icon-label {
      outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
      outline-offset: -1px;
    }

    &[aria-selected="true"] > .icon-label {
      background-color: var(--window-bg);
      color: var(--window-fg);
    }

    &[aria-selected="true"]:focus > .icon-label {
      outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
    }
  }

  thead {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
  }
}


```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\_menus.scss`:

```scss
[role=menu],
[role=menubar] {
  color: var(--window-fg);
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--light);
  border-right-color: var(--darkest);
  border-bottom-color: var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  padding: 2px;

  li {
    &:focus {
      outline: none;
    }

    &:hover {
      background: var(--selection-bg);
      color: var(--selection-fg);
    }

    &[aria-disabled=true] {
      color: var(--dark);
      text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
      border-color: transparent;
    }
  }
}

[role=menubar],
.menu > [role=menu] {
  box-shadow: none;
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
}

[role=menubar] > li {
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  padding: 1px 8px;

  & > ul {
    left: 0;
    top: 100%;
    margin-left: -1px;
    margin-top: 1px;
    min-width: 200px;
  }

  &:hover {
    background: var(--window-bg);
    color: var(--window-fg);
    border: 1px solid var(--lightest);
    border-right-color: var(--dark);
    border-bottom-color: var(--dark);
  }

  &:focus-within {
    background: var(--window-bg);
    color: var(--window-fg);
    border: 1px solid var(--dark);
    border-right-color: var(--lightest);
    border-bottom-color: var(--lightest);
    padding: 2px 7px 0 9px;
  }
}

[role=menu] {
  &:not(:hover) li:focus-within {
    background: var(--selection-bg);
    color: var(--selection-fg);
  }

  li {
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    padding: 1px 3px 1px 19px;

    &[data-shortcut]::after {
      float: right;
      content: attr(data-shortcut);
      display: block;
      margin-left: 4px;
    }

    & > ul {
      left: 100%;
      margin: 0;
      top: -4px;
      margin-left: -1px;
      min-width: 200px;
    }

    &[aria-disabled=true]:hover,
    &[aria-disabled=true]:focus {
      text-shadow: none;
    }


    &[role=separator] {
      border-top: 1px solid var(--dark);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
      height: 0;
      padding: 0;
    }

    &[role=checkbox][aria-checked=true]::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 6px;
      top: 50%;
      margin-top: -3.5px;
      display: block;
      width: 7px;
      height: 7px;
      background: currentColor;
      -webkit-mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
      -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      -webkit-mask-size: 7px 7px;
      mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
      mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      mask-size: 7px 7px;
    }

    &[role=radio][aria-checked=true]::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 7px;
      top: 50%;
      margin-top: -3px;
      display: block;
      background: currentColor;
      width: 6px;
      height: 6px;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }

    &[aria-haspopup=true] {
      position: relative;

      &:after {
        content: '';
        display: block;
        position: absolute;
        right: 8px;
        top: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        width: 4px;
        background: currentColor;
        -webkit-mask-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
        -webkit-mask-size: 4px 7px;
        -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
        -webkit-mask-position: center center;
        mask-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
        mask-size: 4px 7px;
        mask-repeat: no-repeat;
        mask-position: center center;
      }
    }
  }
}

.menu {
  display: flex;
}

.menu > [role=menu] {
  flex-grow: 1;
}

.menu > .title-bar {
  writing-mode: vertical-lr;
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}

.menu > .title-bar > .title-bar-text {
  padding: 4px 0;
}


```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\_panels.scss`:

```scss
.desktop {
  background: var(--desktop-bg);
}

.raised {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-bottom-color: var(--dark);
  border-right-color: var(--dark);
}

.lowered {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom-color: var(--lightest);
  border-right-color: var(--lightest);
}

.top-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 var(--dark);
}

.right-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--light);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 0 0 var(--lightest);
}

.bottom-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--light);
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 var(--lightest);
}

.left-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset -1px 0 0 var(--dark);
}

fieldset {
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom-color: var(--lightest);
  border-right-color: var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  position: relative;
}

legend {
  text-align: left;
  padding: 0 4px;
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  display: block;
}

hr {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
}


```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\_progress.scss`:

```scss
@mixin progress-value {
  border: 1px solid var(--button-bg);
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--selection-bg), var(--selection-bg) 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}

@mixin progress-value-indeterminate {
  width: 32px;
  animation: 1s infinite linear indeterminate;
}

progress,
.progress-bar {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  background: var(--button-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  height: 13px;
}

.progress-bar {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;

  &:not([aria-valuenow])::after,
  & > .progress-bar-value {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    @include progress-value;
  }

  &:not([aria-valuenow])::after {
    @include progress-value-indeterminate;
  }
}

progress::-webkit-progress-bar {
  background: var(--button-bg);
}

progress::-webkit-progress-value {
  @include progress-value;
}

progress::-moz-progress-bar {
  @include progress-value;
}

progress:indeterminate::-moz-progress-bar {
  @include progress-value-indeterminate;
}

progress:not([value])::-webkit-progress-value {
  @include progress-value-indeterminate;
}

@keyframes indeterminate {
  from {
    margin-left: -30px;
  }

  to {
    margin-left: 100%;
  }
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\_root.scss`:

```scss
:root {
  --preferred-font: 'Microsoft Sans Serif';

  --desktop-bg: #008080;

  --window-bg: #C0C0C0;
  --window-fg: #000000;

  --lightest: #FFFFFF;
  --lighter: #E0E0E0;
  --light: #DFDFDF;
  --medium: var(--window-bg);
  --dark: #808080;
  --darker: #404040;
  --darkest: #000000;

  --button-bg: var(--window-bg);
  --button-fg: var(--window-fg);
  --input-bg: #FFFFFF;
  --input-fg: #000000;

  --title-bar-bg: var(--dark);
  --title-bar-fg: var(--medium);

  --title-bar-active-bg: #000080;
  --title-bar-active-fg: #FFFFFF;

  --selection-bg: #000080;
  --selection-fg: #FFFFFF;
  --selection-inverse: #FFFF7F;
}

body {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
}

*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

button::-moz-focus-inner {
  border: none;
}

button, input, textarea, select {
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
  border-radius: 0;
}

a:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
}

code {
  font-family: monospace;
}



```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\_scrollbars.scss`:

```scss
.horizontal-scrollbar,
.vertical-scrollbar {
  display: flex;

  & > button {
    display: flex;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    min-width: 0;
    padding: 0;
    background-repeat: no-repeat;

    &::after {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 7px;
      height: 7px;
      margin: 3px 0 0 3px;
      background-repeat: no-repeat;
    }

    &:focus {
      outline: none;
      border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--light);
      border-left: 1px solid var(--light);
      box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
    }

    &:not(:disabled):active {
      padding: 0;
      border: 1px solid var(--dark);
      box-shadow: none;
      outline: none;

      &::after {
        margin: 4px 0 0 4px;
      }
    }
  }

  & > .scrollbar-track {
    flex-grow: 1;
    background-color: var(--window-bg);
    background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%);
    background-size: 2px 2px;
    background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
    position: relative;

    & > .scrollbar-thumb {
      position: absolute;
      background: var(--button-bg);
      border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
      border-top: 1px solid var(--light);
      border-left: 1px solid var(--light);
      box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
    }
  }
}

.horizontal-scrollbar {
  & > button:first-child::after {
    background-image: url(arrow-left.svg);
    background-position: 1px 0;
  }

  & > button:last-child::after {
    background-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
    background-position: 2px 0;
  }

  & > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb {
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
  }
}

.vertical-scrollbar {
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 16px;

  & > button:first-child::after {
    background-image: url(arrow-up.svg);
    background-position: 0 2px;
  }

  & > button:last-child::after {
    background-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
    background-position: 0 2px;
  }

  & > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb {
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
  }
}

::-webkit-scrollbar {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%);
  background-size: 2px 2px;
  background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {
  background: var(--window-bg);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button,
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  color: var(--button-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--light);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--light);
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  display: none;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:single-button {
  display: block;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:active {
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  box-shadow: none;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:decrement {
  background-image: url(arrow-up.svg);
  background-position: 3px 5px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;

  &:active {
    background-position: 4px 6px;
  }
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:increment {
  background-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
  background-position: 3px 5px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;

  &:active {
    background-position: 4px 6px;
  }
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal:decrement {
  background-image: url(arrow-left.svg);
  background-position: 4px 3px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;

  &:active {
    background-position: 5px 4px;
  }
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal:increment {
  background-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
  background-position: 5px 3px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;

  &:active {
    background-position: 6px 4px;
  }
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\_tabs.scss`:

```scss
.tabs {
  & > menu {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    margin: 0 2px;

    & > button {
      border-bottom: 0;
      border-top-left-radius: 3px;
      border-top-right-radius: 3px;
      box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--light), inset -1px 0 0 var(--dark);
      min-width: 0;
      padding: 2px 10px 2px 10px;

      &:focus,
      &:active {
        border-bottom: 0;
        border-right: 1px solid var(--darkest);
        border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
        border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
        box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--light), inset -1px 0 0 var(--dark);
        padding: 2px 10px 2px 10px;
      }

      &[aria-selected="true"] {
        margin-right: -2px;
        margin-left: -2px;
        margin-top: -2px;
        margin-bottom: -2px;
        padding: 0px 12px 4px 12px;
        z-index: 1;
      }
    }
  }

  & > [role="tabpanel"] {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
    border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--darkest);
    border-right: 1px solid var(--darkest);
    box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--light), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  }
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\_windows.scss`:

```scss
.window,
.dialog,
.menu {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--light);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  position: relative;
  padding: 3px;
}

.window.maximized,
.dialog.maximized {
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
}

.title-bar {
  background: var(--title-bar-bg);
  color: var(--title-bar-fg);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  font-weight: bold;
}

.title-bar-text {
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: bold;
  padding: 1px 4px;
  flex-grow: 1;
  cursor: default
}

.title-bar-buttons {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  padding: 2px;
  align-items: center;
}

.title-bar-buttons button {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 20px;
  height: 18px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: 3px 3px;
}

.title-bar-buttons button:active {
  outline: none;
  background-position: 4px 4px;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--dark);
  border: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  padding: 0;
}

.title-bar-buttons button:not(:active):focus {
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-close] {
  background-image: url(close.svg);
  margin-left: 2px;
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-minimize] {
  background-image: url(minimize.svg);
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize] {
  background-image: url(maximize.svg);
}

.maximized .title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize] {
  background-image: url(restore.svg);
}

.window-body,
.dialog-body {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.window.active > .title-bar,
.dialog.active > .title-bar,
.window:focus-within > .title-bar,
.dialog:focus-within > .title-bar,
.title-bar.active {
  background: var(--title-bar-active-bg);
  color: var(--title-bar-active-fg);
}

.window-body > [role=menubar],
.dialog-body > [role=menubar] {
  margin-top: -3px;
  margin-bottom: 1px;
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\skins\2000.css`:

```css
:root {
  --preferred-font: 'Tahoma';

  --desktop-bg: #3A6EA5;

  --window-bg: #D4D0C8;
  --window-fg: #000000;

  --lightest: #FFFFFF;
  --lighter: #E0E0E0;
  --light: var(--window-bg);
  --medium: #C0C0C0;
  --dark: #808080;
  --darker: #404040;
  --darkest: #000000;

  --input-bg: #FFFFFF;
  --input-fg: #000000;

  --title-bar-bg: linear-gradient(to right, #808080, #C0C0C0);
  --title-bar-fg: var(--medium);

  --title-bar-active-bg: linear-gradient(to right, #0A246A, #A6CAF0);
  --title-bar-active-fg: #FFFFFF;

  --selection-bg: #0A246A;
  --selection-fg: #FFFFFF;
  --selection-inverse: #F5DB95;
}

.menu > .title-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #0000ff, #000000 225px, #000000);
  color: #ffffff;
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\skins\95.css`:

```css
:root {
  --desktop-bg: #008080;

  --window-bg: #C0C0C0;
  --window-fg: #000000;

  --lightest: #FFFFFF;
  --lighter: #E0E0E0;
  --light: #DFDFDF;
  --medium: #C0C0C0;
  --dark: #808080;
  --darker: #404040;
  --darkest: #000000;

  --input-bg: #FFFFFF;
  --input-fg: #000000;

  --title-bar-bg: var(--dark);
  --title-bar-fg: var(--medium);

  --title-bar-active-bg: #000080;
  --title-bar-active-fg: #FFFFFF;

  --selection-bg: #000080;
  --selection-fg: #FFFFFF;
  --selection-inverse: #FFFF7F;
}

/* The "Windows Standard" color scheme in Windows 95 and 98 had an extra  line
 * of color #DFDFDF next to the left and top borders. This is not present in any
 * of the other color schemes.
 */

details > summary:not(:active):focus,
button:not(:active):focus {
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--darkest), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest), 
    inset -2px -2px 0 var(--dark), inset 2px 2px 0 var(--light);
}

details > summary:not(:active),
button:not(:active),
button:disabled:active {
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--light);
}

.title-bar-buttons button:not(:active):focus {
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--light);
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\skins\98.css`:

```css
@import '95.css';

:root {
  --title-bar-bg: linear-gradient(to right, #808080, #B5B5B5);
  --title-bar-active-bg: linear-gradient(to right, #000080, #1084D0);
}

.menu > .title-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #000080 -10px, #0000ff 40px, #000080 90px, #000080);
  color: #ffffff;
}

```
