## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\win9x\theme.css`:

```css
:root {
  --preferred-font: "Microsoft Sans Serif";
  --desktop-bg: #008080;
  --window-bg: #C0C0C0;
  --window-fg: #000000;
  --lightest: #FFFFFF;
  --lighter: #E0E0E0;
  --light: #DFDFDF;
  --medium: var(--window-bg);
  --dark: #808080;
  --darker: #404040;
  --darkest: #000000;
  --button-bg: var(--window-bg);
  --button-fg: var(--window-fg);
  --input-bg: #FFFFFF;
  --input-fg: #000000;
  --title-bar-bg: var(--dark);
  --title-bar-fg: var(--medium);
  --title-bar-active-bg: #000080;
  --title-bar-active-fg: #FFFFFF;
  --selection-bg: #000080;
  --selection-fg: #FFFFFF;
  --selection-inverse: #FFFF7F;
}

body {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
}

*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

button::-moz-focus-inner {
  border: none;
}

button, input, textarea, select {
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
  border-radius: 0;
}

a:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
}

code {
  font-family: monospace;
}

.desktop {
  background: var(--desktop-bg);
}

.raised {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-bottom-color: var(--dark);
  border-right-color: var(--dark);
}

.lowered {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom-color: var(--lightest);
  border-right-color: var(--lightest);
}

.top-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 var(--dark);
}

.right-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--light);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 0 0 var(--lightest);
}

.bottom-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--light);
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 var(--lightest);
}

.left-panel {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset -1px 0 0 var(--dark);
}

fieldset {
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom-color: var(--lightest);
  border-right-color: var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  position: relative;
}

legend {
  text-align: left;
  padding: 0 4px;
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  display: block;
}

hr {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
}

.horizontal-scrollbar,
.vertical-scrollbar {
  display: flex;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button,
.vertical-scrollbar > button {
  display: flex;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button::after,
.vertical-scrollbar > button::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  margin: 3px 0 0 3px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button:focus,
.vertical-scrollbar > button:focus {
  outline: none;
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--light);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--light);
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button:not(:disabled):active,
.vertical-scrollbar > button:not(:disabled):active {
  padding: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  box-shadow: none;
  outline: none;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button:not(:disabled):active::after,
.vertical-scrollbar > button:not(:disabled):active::after {
  margin: 4px 0 0 4px;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track,
.vertical-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track {
  flex-grow: 1;
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%);
  background-size: 2px 2px;
  background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
  position: relative;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb,
.vertical-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb {
  position: absolute;
  background: var(--button-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--light);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--light);
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
}

.horizontal-scrollbar > button:first-child::after {
  background-image: url(arrow-left.svg);
  background-position: 1px 0;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > button:last-child::after {
  background-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
  background-position: 2px 0;
}
.horizontal-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb {
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
}

.vertical-scrollbar {
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 16px;
}
.vertical-scrollbar > button:first-child::after {
  background-image: url(arrow-up.svg);
  background-position: 0 2px;
}
.vertical-scrollbar > button:last-child::after {
  background-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
  background-position: 0 2px;
}
.vertical-scrollbar > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb {
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%);
  background-size: 2px 2px;
  background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {
  background: var(--window-bg);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button,
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  color: var(--button-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--light);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--light);
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  display: none;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:single-button {
  display: block;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:active {
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  box-shadow: none;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:decrement {
  background-image: url(arrow-up.svg);
  background-position: 3px 5px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:decrement:active {
  background-position: 4px 6px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:increment {
  background-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
  background-position: 3px 5px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:increment:active {
  background-position: 4px 6px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal:decrement {
  background-image: url(arrow-left.svg);
  background-position: 4px 3px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal:decrement:active {
  background-position: 5px 4px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal:increment {
  background-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
  background-position: 5px 3px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal:increment:active {
  background-position: 6px 4px;
}

button, input[type=button], input[type=submit], input[type=reset], .button {
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  color: var(--button-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  padding: 3px 10px 6px 10px;
  min-width: 75px;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 1;
  cursor: default;
  user-select: none;
}
button:focus, button.focus, input[type=button]:focus, input[type=button].focus, input[type=submit]:focus, input[type=submit].focus, input[type=reset]:focus, input[type=reset].focus, .button:focus, .button.focus {
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--darkest), inset -2px -2px 0 var(--dark);
  outline-offset: -4px;
}
button:disabled, button.disabled, input[type=button]:disabled, input[type=button].disabled, input[type=submit]:disabled, input[type=submit].disabled, input[type=reset]:disabled, input[type=reset].disabled, .button:disabled, .button.disabled {
  color: var(--dark);
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
}
button:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, button.active, input[type=button]:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, input[type=button].active, input[type=submit]:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, input[type=submit].active, input[type=reset]:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, input[type=reset].active, .button:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, .button.active {
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--dark), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  padding: 4px 9px 5px 11px;
}

input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range]), textarea, .input,
select,
.dropdown {
  background-color: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--input-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light);
  padding: 2px 6px;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
  outline: none;
}
input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range])::selection, textarea::selection, .input::selection,
select::selection,
.dropdown::selection {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}
input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range])[readonly], input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range]).readonly, textarea[readonly], textarea.readonly, .input[readonly], .input.readonly,
select[readonly],
select.readonly,
.dropdown[readonly],
.dropdown.readonly {
  background: var(--window-bg);
}
input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range]):disabled, input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range]).disabled, textarea:disabled, textarea.disabled, .input:disabled, .input.disabled,
select:disabled,
select.disabled,
.dropdown:disabled,
.dropdown.disabled {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--dark);
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
}

select[multiple], select[size]:not([size="1"]) {
  padding: 1px;
}
select[multiple] > option, select[size]:not([size="1"]) > option {
  padding: 2px 6px;
}
select[multiple] > option:checked, select[size]:not([size="1"]) > option:checked {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
}
select[multiple]:focus > option:checked, select[size]:not([size="1"]):focus > option:checked {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}

select:not([size], [multiple]), select[size="1"]:not(:active):focus {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light), inset 2px 2px 0 var(--input-bg), inset -2px -2px 0 var(--input-bg);
}

.dropdown {
  display: inline-grid;
  padding: 0;
  grid-template-areas: "s";
}
.dropdown > select {
  appearance: none;
  grid-area: s;
  padding-right: 21px;
}
.dropdown > select:not(:disabled):active {
  background: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--input-fg);
}
.dropdown > select:not(:disabled):active + .dropdown-button {
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  box-shadow: none;
  margin: 2px 0 0 1px;
}
.dropdown > select:disabled + .dropdown-button {
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px var(--dark), inset 1px 1px var(--lightest);
}
.dropdown > select:disabled + .dropdown-button::after {
  background: var(--dark);
  filter: drop-shadow(1px 1px var(--lightest));
}
.dropdown > .dropdown-button {
  justify-self: end;
  grid-area: s;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  margin: 1px;
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  color: var(--button-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--light);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--light);
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px var(--dark), inset 1px 1px var(--lightest), -1px 0 var(--input-bg);
  width: 16px;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.dropdown > .dropdown-button::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 7px;
  height: 4px;
  -webkit-mask-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
  -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  mask-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
  mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  background: #000;
}

input[type=checkbox] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  background: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--darkest);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light);
  width: 13px;
  height: 13px;
  border-radius: 0;
}
input[type=checkbox]:active, input[type=checkbox]:disabled, input[type=checkbox].active, input[type=checkbox].disabled {
  background: var(--window-bg);
}
input[type=checkbox]:checked::after, input[type=checkbox].checked::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  margin: 2px 0 0 2px;
  background: currentColor;
  -webkit-mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
  -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  -webkit-mask-size: 7px 7px;
  mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
  mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  mask-size: 7px 7px;
}
input[type=checkbox]:disabled, input[type=checkbox].disabled {
  color: var(--dark);
}
input[type=checkbox]:disabled + label, input[type=checkbox].disabled + label {
  color: var(--dark);
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
}

input[type=radio] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  background: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--darkest);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light);
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
}
input[type=radio]:active, input[type=radio]:disabled, input[type=radio].active, input[type=radio].disabled {
  background: var(--window-bg);
}
input[type=radio]:checked::after, input[type=radio].checked::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 4px;
  height: 4px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background-color: currentColor;
  margin-top: 3px;
  margin-left: 3px;
}
input[type=radio]:disabled, input[type=radio].disabled {
  color: var(--dark);
}
input[type=radio]:disabled + label, input[type=radio].disabled + label {
  color: var(--dark);
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
}

input[type=checkbox]:focus, input[type=checkbox].focus,
input[type=radio]:focus,
input[type=radio].focus {
  outline: none;
}
input[type=checkbox]:focus + label, input[type=checkbox].focus + label,
input[type=radio]:focus + label,
input[type=radio].focus + label {
  position: relative;
}
input[type=checkbox]:focus + label::after, input[type=checkbox].focus + label::after,
input[type=radio]:focus + label::after,
input[type=radio].focus + label::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: calc(var(--spacing) - 1px);
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  border: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
  border-radius: 1px;
}

label > input[type=radio]:focus, label > input[type=radio].focus,
label > input[type=checkbox]:focus,
label > input[type=checkbox].focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
  outline-offset: 1px;
}

input[type=range] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  width: 100%;
  background: transparent;
  padding: 2px;
}
input[type=range]:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
}
input[type=range]::-moz-range-track {
  height: 2px;
  background: var(--light);
  border: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--dark);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest);
  margin: 0 5px;
}
input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
  border-radius: 0;
  background: var(--button-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  width: 11px;
  height: 21px;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
}
input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb:active {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%);
  background-size: 2px 2px;
  background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
  height: 2px;
  background: var(--light);
  border: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--dark);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darkest);
  margin: 0 5px;
  margin: 10px 5px;
}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  margin-top: -11px;
  border-radius: 0;
  background: var(--button-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  width: 11px;
  height: 21px;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb:active {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--lightest) 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, var(--lightest) 75%);
  background-size: 2px 2px;
  background-position: 0 0, 0 1px, 1px -1px, -1px 0px;
}

progress,
.progress-bar {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  background: var(--button-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  height: 13px;
}

.progress-bar {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.progress-bar:not([aria-valuenow])::after, .progress-bar > .progress-bar-value {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--button-bg);
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--selection-bg), var(--selection-bg) 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}
.progress-bar:not([aria-valuenow])::after {
  width: 32px;
  animation: 1s infinite linear indeterminate;
}

progress::-webkit-progress-bar {
  background: var(--button-bg);
}

progress::-webkit-progress-value {
  border: 1px solid var(--button-bg);
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--selection-bg), var(--selection-bg) 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}

progress::-moz-progress-bar {
  border: 1px solid var(--button-bg);
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--selection-bg), var(--selection-bg) 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}

progress:indeterminate::-moz-progress-bar {
  width: 32px;
  animation: 1s infinite linear indeterminate;
}

progress:not([value])::-webkit-progress-value {
  width: 32px;
  animation: 1s infinite linear indeterminate;
}

@keyframes indeterminate {
  from {
    margin-left: -30px;
  }
  to {
    margin-left: 100%;
  }
}
.window,
.dialog,
.menu {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--light);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  position: relative;
  padding: 3px;
}

.window.maximized,
.dialog.maximized {
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
}

.title-bar {
  background: var(--title-bar-bg);
  color: var(--title-bar-fg);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  font-weight: bold;
}

.title-bar-text {
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: bold;
  padding: 1px 4px;
  flex-grow: 1;
  cursor: default;
}

.title-bar-buttons {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  padding: 2px;
  align-items: center;
}

.title-bar-buttons button {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 20px;
  height: 18px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: 3px 3px;
}

.title-bar-buttons button:active {
  outline: none;
  background-position: 4px 4px;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light), inset 1px 1px 0 var(--dark);
  border: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  padding: 0;
}

.title-bar-buttons button:not(:active):focus {
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-close] {
  background-image: url(close.svg);
  margin-left: 2px;
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-minimize] {
  background-image: url(minimize.svg);
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize] {
  background-image: url(maximize.svg);
}

.maximized .title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize] {
  background-image: url(restore.svg);
}

.window-body,
.dialog-body {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.window.active > .title-bar,
.dialog.active > .title-bar,
.window:focus-within > .title-bar,
.dialog:focus-within > .title-bar,
.title-bar.active {
  background: var(--title-bar-active-bg);
  color: var(--title-bar-active-fg);
}

.window-body > [role=menubar],
.dialog-body > [role=menubar] {
  margin-top: -3px;
  margin-bottom: 1px;
}

[role=menu],
[role=menubar] {
  color: var(--window-fg);
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--light);
  border-right-color: var(--darkest);
  border-bottom-color: var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  padding: 2px;
}
[role=menu] li:focus,
[role=menubar] li:focus {
  outline: none;
}
[role=menu] li:hover,
[role=menubar] li:hover {
  background: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}
[role=menu] li[aria-disabled=true],
[role=menubar] li[aria-disabled=true] {
  color: var(--dark);
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 var(--lightest);
  border-color: transparent;
}

[role=menubar],
.menu > [role=menu] {
  box-shadow: none;
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
}

[role=menubar] > li {
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  padding: 1px 8px;
}
[role=menubar] > li > ul {
  left: 0;
  top: 100%;
  margin-left: -1px;
  margin-top: 1px;
  min-width: 200px;
}
[role=menubar] > li:hover {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right-color: var(--dark);
  border-bottom-color: var(--dark);
}
[role=menubar] > li:focus-within {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-right-color: var(--lightest);
  border-bottom-color: var(--lightest);
  padding: 2px 7px 0 9px;
}

[role=menu]:not(:hover) li:focus-within {
  background: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}
[role=menu] li {
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  padding: 1px 3px 1px 19px;
}
[role=menu] li[data-shortcut]::after {
  float: right;
  content: attr(data-shortcut);
  display: block;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
[role=menu] li > ul {
  left: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  top: -4px;
  margin-left: -1px;
  min-width: 200px;
}
[role=menu] li[aria-disabled=true]:hover, [role=menu] li[aria-disabled=true]:focus {
  text-shadow: none;
}
[role=menu] li[role=separator] {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  height: 0;
  padding: 0;
}
[role=menu] li[role=checkbox][aria-checked=true]::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 6px;
  top: 50%;
  margin-top: -3.5px;
  display: block;
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  background: currentColor;
  -webkit-mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
  -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  -webkit-mask-size: 7px 7px;
  mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
  mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  mask-size: 7px 7px;
}
[role=menu] li[role=radio][aria-checked=true]::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 7px;
  top: 50%;
  margin-top: -3px;
  display: block;
  background: currentColor;
  width: 6px;
  height: 6px;
  border-radius: 50%;
}
[role=menu] li[aria-haspopup=true] {
  position: relative;
}
[role=menu] li[aria-haspopup=true]:after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  right: 8px;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 4px;
  background: currentColor;
  -webkit-mask-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
  -webkit-mask-size: 4px 7px;
  -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  -webkit-mask-position: center center;
  mask-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
  mask-size: 4px 7px;
  mask-repeat: no-repeat;
  mask-position: center center;
}

.menu {
  display: flex;
}

.menu > [role=menu] {
  flex-grow: 1;
}

.menu > .title-bar {
  writing-mode: vertical-lr;
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}

.menu > .title-bar > .title-bar-text {
  padding: 4px 0;
}

.tabs > menu {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  margin: 0 2px;
}
.tabs > menu > button {
  border-bottom: 0;
  border-top-left-radius: 3px;
  border-top-right-radius: 3px;
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--light), inset -1px 0 0 var(--dark);
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 2px 10px 2px 10px;
}
.tabs > menu > button:focus, .tabs > menu > button:active {
  border-bottom: 0;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--light), inset -1px 0 0 var(--dark);
  padding: 2px 10px 2px 10px;
}
.tabs > menu > button[aria-selected=true] {
  margin-right: -2px;
  margin-left: -2px;
  margin-top: -2px;
  margin-bottom: -2px;
  padding: 0px 12px 4px 12px;
  z-index: 1;
}
.tabs > [role=tabpanel] {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--light), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
}

.list {
  background: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--input-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--darker), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--light);
  padding: 1px;
  overflow: auto;
  cursor: default;
}
.list > [role=option] {
  padding: 2px 6px 2px 6px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.list > [role=option][aria-selected=true] {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
}
.list > [role=option]:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
  outline-offset: -1px;
}
.list > [role=option][aria-selected=true]:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
}
.list:focus-within > [role=option][aria-selected=true] {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}

.icon-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, 128px);
  flex-direction: row;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.icon-grid > .icon {
  flex: 0 0 128px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  margin: 4px;
}
.icon-grid > .icon > .icon-label {
  margin-top: 5px;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 1px 1px;
}
.icon-grid > .icon:focus {
  outline: none;
}
.icon-grid > .icon:focus > .icon-label {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
  outline-offset: -1px;
}
.icon-grid > .icon[aria-selected=true] > .icon-label {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
}
.icon-grid > .icon[aria-selected=true]:focus > .icon-label {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
}
.icon-grid:focus-within > .icon[aria-selected=true] > .icon-label {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}

.detailed {
  width: 100%;
  border-spacing: 0;
}
.detailed th {
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: normal;
  background-color: var(--button-bg);
  color: var(--button-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--darkest);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  border-left: 1px solid var(--lightest);
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 var(--dark);
  padding: 2px 6px 2px 6px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.detailed tr {
  outline: none;
}
.detailed tr:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
  outline-offset: -1px;
}
.detailed tr[aria-selected=true] {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
}
.detailed tr[aria-selected=true]:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
}
.detailed:focus-within tr[aria-selected=true] {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}
.detailed:focus-within .icon[aria-selected=true] .icon-label {
  background-color: var(--selection-bg);
  color: var(--selection-fg);
}
.detailed td {
  padding: 2px 6px 2px 6px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.detailed td.icon {
  display: flex;
}
.detailed .icon {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  outline: none;
}
.detailed .icon > img {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  margin-right: 1px;
  margin-left: -4px;
}
.detailed .icon > .icon-label {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 1px 3px;
}
.detailed .icon:focus .icon-label {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--darkest);
  outline-offset: -1px;
}
.detailed .icon[aria-selected=true] > .icon-label {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
}
.detailed .icon[aria-selected=true]:focus > .icon-label {
  outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
}
.detailed thead {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
}

```

```scss
@use 'panels';
@use 'scrollbars';
```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\winxp\_buttons.scss`:

```scss
@use '../../util/util';

#{util.$buttons} {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #F0F0EA 100%);
  color: #000;
  border: 1px solid #003C74;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 2px 16px 3px;
  box-shadow: -1px -1px 0 #E2DED4, 1px 1px 0 #FBFAF8, inset -1px -2px 1px #D6D0C5;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 1;
  position: relative;
  min-width: 90px;
  cursor: default;
  user-select: none;

  &::after {
    content: '';
    display: none;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    border-radius: 3px;
  }

  &:disabled, &.disabled {
    background: #F5F4EA;
    color: #A1A192;
    border: 1px solid #C9C7BA;
    box-shadow: none;
  }

  &:focus, &.focus {
    outline: none;

    &::after {
      display: block;
      border: 2px solid #6F98CFB2;
    }
  }

  &:not(:disabled, .disabled):hover, &.hover {
    &::after {
      display: block;
      border: 2px solid #F5C05DB2;
    }
  }

  &:focus-visible::after {
    outline: 1px dotted #563A2E;
    outline-offset: -2px;
  }

  &:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, &.active {
    background: #E2E1D9;
    box-shadow: inset 1px 2px 1px #D1CCC1, inset 0 -1px 1px #fff;

    &::after {
      display: none;
    }
  }
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\winxp\_inputs.scss`:

```scss
@use '../../util/util';

#{util.$textInputs},
select {
  background-color: var(--input-bg);
  color: var(--input-fg);
  border: 1px solid #7F9DB9;
  padding: 2px 6px;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
  outline: none;

  &::selection {
    background-color: var(--selection-bg);
    color: var(--selection-fg);
  }

  &[readonly], &.readonly {
    background: var(--window-bg);
  }

  &:disabled, &.disabled {
    background: var(--window-bg);
    color: #ACA899;
  }
}

select > option {
  padding: 2px 6px;
}

#{util.$multiSelects} {
  padding: 1px;

  & > option {
    padding: 2px 6px;

    &:checked {
      background-color: var(--window-bg);
      color: var(--window-fg);
    }
  }

  &:focus > option:checked {
    outline: 1px dotted var(--selection-inverse);
    background-color: var(--selection-bg);
    color: var(--selection-fg);
  }
}

#{util.$singleSelects} {
  &:disabled {
    border-color: #C9C7BA;
  }
}

.dropdown {
  display: inline-grid;
  padding: 0;
  grid-template-areas: 's';

  & > select {
    appearance: none;
    grid-area: s;
    padding-right: 21px;

    &:focus {
      background: var(--selection-bg);
      color: var(--selection-fg);
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #fff;
    }

    &:not(:disabled):hover {
      & + .dropdown-button {
        background-image: radial-gradient(circle at top left, #FFFFFF, #B9DAFB);
        border-color: #8AA6E3;
      }
    }

    &:not(:disabled):active {
      background: var(--input-bg);
      color: var(--input-fg);

      & + .dropdown-button {
        background-image: radial-gradient(circle at top left, #6E8EF1, #D2DEEB);
        border-color: #7C89DB;
        border-right-color: #B3C8F5;
        border-bottom-color: #B3C8F5;
      }
    }

    &:disabled {
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #F5F4EA;

      & + .dropdown-button {
        background-image: radial-gradient(circle at top left, #F7F7F4, #E6E6DD);
        border-color: #E7E7DE;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #fff, -3px 0 #F5F4EA;

        &::after {
          background: #C9C9C2; 
        }
      }
    }
  }

  & > .dropdown-button {
    justify-self: end;
    grid-area: s;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 2px;
    background-color: var(--button-bg);
    color: var(--button-fg);
    background-image: radial-gradient(circle at top left, #E1EAFE, #AEC8F7);
    border: 1px solid #ADC3F6;
    border-radius: 2px;
    width: 15px;
    pointer-events: none;
    box-shadow: -2px 0 #fff;

    &::after {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 9px;
      height: 6px;
      -webkit-mask-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
      -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      mask-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
      mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      background: #4D6185;
    }
  }
}


input[type=checkbox] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  width: 13px;
  height: 13px;
  border-radius: 0;

  &:checked::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 7px;
    height: 7px;
    margin: 2px 0 0 2px;
    background: #21A121;
    -webkit-mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
    -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
    -webkit-mask-size: 7px 7px;
    mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
    mask-repeat: no-repeat;
    mask-size: 7px 7px;
  }

  &:not(:disabled):active {
    &:checked::after {
      background: #1D8C1B;
    }
  }

  &:disabled:checked::after {
    background: #CAC8BB;
  }
}

input[type=radio] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  width: 13px;
  height: 13px;
  border-radius: 50%;

  &:checked::after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 5px;
    height: 5px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, #55D551 0, #139210 75%);
    margin-top: 3px;
    margin-left: 3px;
  }

  &:disabled:checked::after {
    background: #CAC8BB;
  }
}

input[type=checkbox],
input[type=radio] {
  background: radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, #DCDCD7 0, #FFFFFF 75%);
  border: 1px solid #1C5180;

  &:not(:disabled):hover {
    box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 1px #FFF0CF, inset 0 0 0 2px #F8B636;
  }

  &:not(:disabled):active {
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, #B0B0A7 0, #F1EFDF 75%);
    box-shadow: none;
  }

  &:disabled {
    background: #FFF;
    border-color: #CAC8BB;
  }

  &:disabled + label {
    color: #A1A192;
  }

  &:focus {
    outline: none;

    &:focus-visible + label {
      position: relative;
      &::after {
        content: '';
        display: block;
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: calc(var(--spacing) - 1px);
        right: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        border: 1px dotted #000;
        border-radius: 1px;
      }
    }
  }
}

label > input[type=radio]:focus-visible,
label > input[type=checkbox]:focus-visible {
  outline: 1px dotted #000;
  outline-offset: 1px;
}

@mixin range-track {
  height: 2px;
  background: #F0EDE0;
  border: 1px solid #FFFFFF;
  border-top: 1px solid #9D9C99;
  border-left: 1px solid #9D9C99;
  border-radius: 2px;
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px #F2F1E9;
  margin: 0 5px;
}

@mixin range-thumb {
  border-radius: 0;
  background: #F3F3EF;
  border: 1px solid #778892;
  border-top: 1px solid #B5C4CD;
  border-left: 1px solid #B5C4CD;
  width: 9px;
  height: 20px;
  box-shadow: inset 0 2px #48CB46, inset 0 -2px #48CB46;
  border-radius: 2px;

  &:hover {
    box-shadow: inset 0 2px #F9B435, inset 0 -2px #F9B435;
  }

  &:active {
    box-shadow: inset 0 2px #229512, inset 0 -2px #229512;
  }
}

input[type=range] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  width: 100%;
  background: transparent; 
  padding: 2px;

  &:focus {
    outline: 1px dotted #131627;
  }

  &::-moz-range-track {
    @include range-track;
  }

  &::-moz-range-thumb {
    @include range-thumb;
  }

  &::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
    @include range-track;
    margin: 10px 5px;
  }

  &::-webkit-slider-thumb {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    margin-top: -10px;
    @include range-thumb;
  }
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\winxp\_menus.scss`:

```scss
[role=menubar] {
  padding: 1px;

  & > li {
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    padding: 1px 8px;

    & > ul {
      left: 0;
      top: 100%;
      min-width: 200px;
    }
  }
}

[role=menu] {
  color: #000000;
  background-color: #FFFFFF;
  border: 1px solid #ACA899;
  padding: 2px;
  box-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);

  li {
    position: relative;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    padding: 1px 3px 1px 19px;

    &[data-shortcut]::after {
      float: right;
      content: attr(data-shortcut);
      display: block;
      margin-left: 4px;
    }

    & > ul {
      left: 100%;
      margin: 0;
      top: -4px;
      margin-left: -3px;
      min-width: 200px;
    }

    &[role=separator] {
      border-top: 1px solid #ACA899;
      margin: 3px;
      height: 0;
      padding: 0;
    }

    &[role=checkbox][aria-checked=true]::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 6px;
      top: 50%;
      margin-top: -3.5px;
      display: block;
      width: 7px;
      height: 7px;
      background: currentColor;
      -webkit-mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
      -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      -webkit-mask-size: 7px 7px;
      mask-image: url(checkmark.svg);
      mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      mask-size: 7px 7px;
    }

    &[role=radio][aria-checked=true]::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 7px;
      top: 50%;
      margin-top: -2px;
      display: block;
      background: currentColor;
      width: 5px;
      height: 5px;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }

    &[aria-haspopup=true] {
      &::after {
        content: '';
        display: block;
        position: absolute;
        right: 8px;
        top: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        width: 4px;
        background: currentColor;
        -webkit-mask-image: url(menu-right.svg);
        -webkit-mask-size: 4px 7px;
        -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
        -webkit-mask-position: center center;
        mask-image: url(menu-right.svg);
        mask-size: 4px 7px;
        mask-repeat: no-repeat;
        mask-position: center center;
      }
    }
  }
}

.menu > [role=menu] {
  box-shadow: none;
  border: none;
}

[role=menu],
[role=menubar] {
  &:not(:hover) li:focus-within {
    background: var(--selection-bg);
    color: var(--selection-fg);
  }

  li {
    &:focus {
      outline: none;
    }

    &:hover {
      background: var(--selection-bg);
      color: var(--selection-fg);
    }

    &[aria-disabled=true] {
      color: #ACA899;
    }
  }
}


```

```scss
.desktop {
  background: var(--desktop-bg);
}

.raised {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FCFCFE 0%, #F4F3EE 100%);
  border: 1px solid #919B9C;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 #FCFCFE, 1px 1px 0 #D0CEBF, 2px 2px 0 #E3E0D0;
}

.lowered {
}

.top-panel {
  color: #FFFFFF;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #003DDC, transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(270deg, rgba(0, 14, 125, 0.5), transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #3D95FF 0%, #3D95FF 5%, #0054E3 10%, #0372FF 84%, #026AFE 90%, #0144D0 97%, #0144D0 100%);
  border-bottom: 1px solid #1941A5;
}

.right-panel {
  color: #FFFFFF;
  background: linear-gradient(0, #003DDC, transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 14, 125, 0.5), transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, #3D95FF 0%, #3D95FF 5%, #0054E3 10%, #0372FF 84%, #026AFE 90%, #0144D0 97%, #0144D0 100%);
  border-left: 1px solid #2867E1;
}

.bottom-panel {
  color: #FFFFFF;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #003DDC, transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(270deg, rgba(0, 14, 125, 0.5), transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #3D95FF 0%, #3D95FF 5%, #0054E3 10%, #0372FF 84%, #026AFE 90%, #0144D0 97%, #0144D0 100%);
  border-top: 1px solid #3168D5;
}

.left-panel {
  color: #FFFFFF;
  background: linear-gradient(0, #003DDC, transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 14, 125, 0.5), transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, #3D95FF 0%, #3D95FF 5%, #0054E3 10%, #0372FF 84%, #026AFE 90%, #0144D0 97%, #0144D0 100%);
  border-right: 1px solid #1941A5;
}

fieldset {
  border: 1px solid #D0D0BF;
  border-radius: 3px;
}

legend {
  text-align: left;
  padding: 0 4px;
  color: #0046D5;
  display: block;
}

hr {
  border-top: 1px solid #ACA899;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #FFFFFF;
}
```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\winxp\_progress.scss`:

```scss
@mixin progress-value {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #fffa, transparent 50%, #fffa 100%), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #2ED331, #2ED331 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}

@mixin progress-value-indeterminate {
  width: 30px;
  animation: 1s infinite linear indeterminate;
}

progress,
.progress-bar {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  -moz-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  background: #fff;;
  border: 1px solid #686868;
  border-radius: 3px;
  height: 13px;
  padding: 2px 3px;
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px #BEBEBE, inset 2px 2px #EFEFEF, inset -1px -1px #EFEFEF;
}

.progress-bar {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;

  &:not([aria-valuenow])::after,
  & > .progress-bar-value {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    position: absolute;
    top: 2px;
    bottom: 2px;
    left: 3px;
    @include progress-value;
  }

  &:not([aria-valuenow])::after {
    @include progress-value-indeterminate;
  }
}

progress::-webkit-progress-bar {
  background: #fff;
}

progress::-webkit-progress-value {
  @include progress-value;
}

progress::-moz-progress-bar {
  @include progress-value;
}

progress:indeterminate::-moz-progress-bar {
  @include progress-value-indeterminate;
}

progress:not([value])::-webkit-progress-value {
  @include progress-value-indeterminate;
}

@keyframes indeterminate {
  from {
    margin-left: -30px;
  }

  to {
    margin-left: 100%;
  }
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\winxp\_root.scss`:

```scss
:root {
  --preferred-font: 'Tahoma';

  --desktop-bg: #004E98;

  --window-bg: #ECE9D8;
  --window-fg: #000000;

  --button-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #F0F0EA 100%);
  --button-fg: var(--window-fg);
  --input-bg: #FFFFFF;
  --input-fg: #000000;

  --selection-bg: #316AC5;
  --selection-fg: #FFFFFF;
  --selection-inverse: #CE953A;
}

body {
  background-color: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
}

*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

button::-moz-focus-inner {
  border: none;
}

button, input, textarea, select {
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
}

a:focus {
  outline: 1px dotted #000;
}

code {
  font-family: monospace;
}



```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\winxp\_scrollbars.scss`:

```scss
.horizontal-scrollbar,
.vertical-scrollbar {
  display: flex;
  background: #EEEDE5;

  & > button {
    display: flex;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    min-width: 0;
    padding: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, #EEEDE5, #AEC8F7 75%);
    border: 1px solid #fff;
    border-radius: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 1px;
    margin-right: 1px;
    box-shadow: 0 1px #A0B5D3, 1px 0 #7C9FD3, inset 1px 1px #B7CAF5, inset -1px -1px #B3C8F5;

    &::after, &:active::after, &:hover::after {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 9px;
      height: 9px;
      margin: 3px 0 0 3px;
      background: #4D6185;
      -webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      mask-repeat: no-repeat;
      position: initial;
      box-shadow: none;
      border: 0;
    }

    &:focus {
      outline: none;
    }

    &:not(:disabled):active {
      padding: 0;
    }

    &:not(:disabled, .disabled):hover, &.hover {
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, #FDFFFF, #B9DAFB 75%);
      box-shadow: 0 1px #A0B5D3, 1px 0 #7C9FD3, inset 1px 1px #ABBEE9, inset -1px -1px #8DA8E1;

      &::after {
        border: 0;
      }
    }

    &:not(:disabled, .disabled):active {
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, #6E8EF1, #D2DEEB 75%);
      box-shadow: 0 1px #A0B5D3, 1px 0 #7C9FD3, inset 1px 1px #98A1DD, inset -1px -1px #B1C6F3;

      &:after {
        display: block;
      }
    }
  }

  & > .scrollbar-track {
    flex-grow: 1;
    position: relative;

    & > .scrollbar-thumb {
      position: absolute;
      border: 1px solid #fff;
      border-radius: 2px;
      box-shadow: 1px 1px #7DA0D4, inset 1px -1px #B4C8F6, inset 0 1px #BDCEF7, inset 0 2px #D1E0FD;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;

      &:hover {
        box-shadow: 1px 1px #7DA0D4, inset 1px -1px #B4C8F6, inset 0 1px #ACCEFF, inset 0 2px #E0EDFF;
      }

      &:active {
        box-shadow: 1px 1px #7DA0D4, inset 1px -1px #B4C8F6, inset 0 1px #839BD4, inset 0 2px #9FB4EC;
      }
    }
  }
}

.horizontal-scrollbar {
  padding: 1px 0;

  & > button {
    height: 15px;
  }

  & > button:first-child::after {
    -webkit-mask-image: url(arrow-left.svg);
    -webkit-mask-size: 6px 9px;
    mask-image: url(arrow-left.svg);
    mask-size: 6px 9px;
    margin: 2px 0 0 3px;
  }

  & > button:last-child::after {
    -webkit-mask-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
    -webkit-mask-size: 6px 9px;
    mask-image: url(arrow-right.svg);
    mask-size: 6px 9px;
    margin: 2px 0 0 5px;
  }

  & > .scrollbar-track {
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #F3F1EC, #FEFEFB);

    & > .scrollbar-thumb {
      height: 15px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #C8D6FB, #B9CBF3); 
      top: 0;
      bottom: 0;

      &:hover {
        background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #DAE9FF, #CCE1FF);
      }

      &:active {
        background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #A8BEF6, #92B2F6);
      }

      &::after {
        display: block;
        content: '';
        width: 8px;
        height: 7px;
        background: repeating-linear-gradient(to right, #EEF4FE, #EEF4FE 1px, #8CB0F8 1px, #8CB0F8 2px);
      }
    }
  }
}

.vertical-scrollbar {
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 17px;
  padding: 0 1px;

  & > button {
    width: 15px;
  }

  & > button:first-child::after {
    -webkit-mask-image: url(arrow-up.svg);
    -webkit-mask-size: 9px 6px;
    mask-image: url(arrow-up.svg);
    mask-size: 9px 6px;
    margin: 4px 0 0 2px;
  }

  & > button:last-child::after {
    -webkit-mask-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
    -webkit-mask-size: 9px 6px;
    mask-image: url(arrow-down.svg);
    mask-size: 9px 6px;
    margin: 5px 0 0 2px;
  }

  & > .scrollbar-track {
    background: linear-gradient(to right, #F3F1EC, #FEFEFB);

    & > .scrollbar-thumb {
      width: 15px;
      background: linear-gradient(to right, #C8D6FB, #B9CBF3); 
      left: 0;
      right: 0;

      &:hover {
        background: linear-gradient(to right, #DAE9FF, #CCE1FF);
      }

      &:active {
        background: linear-gradient(to right, #A8BEF6, #92B2F6);
      }

      &::after {
        display: block;
        content: '';
        width: 7px;
        height: 8px;
        background: repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, #EEF4FE, #EEF4FE 1px, #8CB0F8 1px, #8CB0F8 2px);
      }
    }
  }
}

::-webkit-scrollbar {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #F3F1EC, #FEFEFB);
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {
  background: var(--window-bg);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  width: 15px;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #C8D6FB, #B9CBF3);
  border-right: 1px solid #7DA0D4;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #7DA0D4;
  border-radius: 2px;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #fff, inset 2px -2px #B4C8F6, inset 0 2px #BDCEF7, inset 0 3px #D1E0FD;

  &:hover {
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #DAE9FF, #CCE1FF);
    box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #fff, inset 0 0 0 2px #ACCEFF, inset 0 3px #E0EDFF;
  }

  &:active {
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #A8BEF6, #92B2F6);
    box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #fff, inset 0 0 0 2px #839BD4, inset 3px 3px #9FB4EC;
  }
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  display: none;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:single-button {
  display: block;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical {
  width: 16px;
  height: 17px;

  &:hover {
    background-position: -16px 0;
  }

  &:active {
    background-position: -32px 0;
  }
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal {
  width: 17px;
  height: 16px;

  &:hover {
    background-position: -17px 0;
  }

  &:active {
    background-position: -34px 0;
  }
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:decrement {
  background-image: url(scroll-up.svg);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:increment {
  background-image: url(scroll-down.svg);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal:decrement {
  background-image: url(scroll-left.svg);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:horizontal:increment {
  background-image: url(scroll-right.svg);
}

```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\winxp\_tabs.scss`:

```scss
.tabs {
  & > menu {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    margin: 0 2px;
    gap: 1px;


    & > button {
      border-bottom: 0;
      border-top-left-radius: 3px;
      border-top-right-radius: 3px;
      border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
      border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
      border-color: #91A7B4;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #fff, #EFEEE8);
      box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 #ECEBE6;
      min-width: 0;
      padding: 4px 10px 4px 10px;

      &:hover {
        border-top: 1px solid #E68B2C;
        box-shadow: inset 0 2px 0 #FFC73C;

        &::after {
          border-left: none;
          border-right: none;
          border-bottom: none;
        }
      }

      &:focus,
      &:active {
        outline: none;
      }

      &::after {
        display: none;
      }

      &:focus-visible {
        outline: 1px dotted #000;
        outline-offset: -3px;
      }

      &[aria-selected="true"] {
        background: #FCFCFE;
        border-right: 1px solid #919B9C;
        border-top: 1px solid #E68B2C;
        border-left: 1px solid #919B9C;
        box-shadow: inset 0 2px 0 #FFC73C;
        margin-right: -2px;
        margin-left: -2px;
        margin-top: -2px;
        margin-bottom: -1px;
        padding: 2px 12px 6px 12px;
        z-index: 1;
      }
    }
  }

  & > [role="tabpanel"] {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FCFCFE 0%, #F4F3EE 100%);
    border: 1px solid #919B9C;
    box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 #FCFCFE, 1px 1px 0 #D0CEBF, 2px 2px 0 #E3E0D0;
  }
}


```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\winxp\_windows.scss`:

```scss
.window,
.dialog,
.menu {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #758CDD, #7587DD 100%);
  border-left: 1px solid #5B68CD;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #4F53BC;
  border-right: 1px solid #4F53BC;
  border-top-left-radius: 8px;
  border-top-right-radius: 8px;
  position: relative;
  padding: 2px;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 #6D74CD, inset -2px -2px 0 #7587DD, inset 1px 0 0 #7480DC, inset 2px 0 0 #758CDD;
}

.window {
  padding: 3px;
}

.window.maximized,
.dialog.maximized {
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
}

.window.active,
.window:focus-within,
.dialog.active,
.dialog:focus-within,
.menu {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #166AEE, #002CBC 100%);
  border-left-color: #0734DA;
  border-bottom-color: #00138C;
  border-right-color: #00138C;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px 0 #001DA0, inset -2px -2px 0 #003DDC, inset 1px 0 0 #166AEE, inset 2px 0 0 #0855DD;
}

.title-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7783DA, transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(270deg, rgba(37, 39, 105, 0.5), transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #98B2E8 0%, #9DB9EB 5%, #7996DE 10%, #7D9BE3 84%, #80A5E7 90%, #7A93DF 97%, #7A93DF 100%);
  color: #D8E4F8;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  font-weight: bold;
  border-top-left-radius: 8px;
  border-top-right-radius: 8px;
  border-top: 1px solid #688DE0;
  border-left: 1px solid #5B68CD;
  border-right: 1px solid #00138C;
}

.use-preferred-font .title-bar {
  font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif;
}

.window.active > .title-bar,
.window:focus-within > .title-bar,
.dialog.active > .title-bar,
.dialog:focus-within > .title-bar,
.title-bar.active,
.menu .title-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #003DDC, transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(270deg, rgba(0, 14, 125, 0.5), transparent 5px),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #3D95FF 0%, #3D95FF 5%, #0054E3 10%, #0372FF 84%, #026AFE 90%, #0144D0 97%, #0144D0 100%);
  color: #FFFFFF;
  border-top-color: #0058EB;
  border-left-color: #001ABC;
}

.window > .title-bar {
  margin: -3px -4px 0 -4px;
}

.dialog > .title-bar,
.menu > .title-bar {
  margin: -2px -3px 0 -3px;
}

.title-bar-text {
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: bold;
  padding: 7px 6px 4px;
  flex-grow: 1;
  cursor: default;
}

.window.active > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.window:focus-within > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.dialog.active > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.dialog:focus-within > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.title-bar.active .title-bar-text {
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 #0A1883;
}

.title-bar-buttons {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  padding: 5px 5px 3px 5px;
  align-items: center;
}

.title-bar-buttons button {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 21px;
  height: 21px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: 3px 3px;
  border: 1px solid #fff;
  box-shadow: none;
  margin-left: 2px;
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), inset -2px -2px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;


  &:hover {
    filter: brightness(1.2);
  }

  &, &:active {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #BFD1FC 0%, transparent 20%),
      linear-gradient(90deg, #5E8BF7 0%, transparent 40%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, #5E8BF7 0%, transparent 30%),
      linear-gradient(to bottom right, #467EF5, #0760F3);
  }

  &:active {
    outline: none;
    filter: brightness(0.8);
    box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
  }

  &::after {
    display: none;
    position: initial;
  }

  &[data-close] {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #EFA390 0%, transparent 20%),
      linear-gradient(90deg, #E98168 0%, transparent 40%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, #E98168 0%, transparent 30%),
      linear-gradient(to bottom right, #E66A4D, #E03802);
  }
}


.title-bar-buttons button[data-close]::after,
.title-bar-buttons button[data-minimize]::after,
.title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize]::after,
.maximized .title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize]::after {
  display: block;
  content: '';
  width: 11px;
  height: 11px;
  border: 0;
  outline: none;
  margin: auto;
  background: white;
  border-radius: 0;
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-close]::after {
  -webkit-mask-image: url(close.svg);
  mask-image: url(close.svg);
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-minimize]::after {
  -webkit-mask-image: url(minimize.svg);
  mask-image: url(minimize.svg);
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize]::after {
  -webkit-mask-image: url(maximize.svg);
  mask-image: url(maximize.svg);
}

.maximized .title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize]::after {
  -webkit-mask-image: url(restore.svg);
  mask-image: url(restore.svg);
}

.window-body,
.dialog-body {
  background: var(--window-bg);
  color: var(--window-fg);
}



```

## File content `lib-nielssp-classic-stylesheets\themes\winxp\skins\olive-green.css`:

```css
:root {
```
```css
  --desktop-bg: #9DACBD;
  --window-bg: #ECE9D8;
  --selection-bg: #93A070;
  --selection-inverse: #6C5F8F;
}

.top-panel, .bottom-panel {

}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  border-right-color: #829061;
  border-bottom-color: #8B9377;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #fff, inset 0 0 0 2px #8D9D73, inset 3px 0 #ADBB9A;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #A4B48B, #95A775);
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #C8D5AA, #C3D096);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #fff, inset 2px 2px #BCC797, inset -2px -2px #BCC797, inset 3px 0 #D2DBB5;
}

  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #9BAD82, #94A972);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #fff, inset -2px -2px #90A476, inset 2px 2px #7B8B65, inset 3px 3px #879571, inset 4px 4px #92A478;

  background: linear-gradient(to right, #C8D5AA, #C3D096);
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:vertical:active {
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #9BAD82, #94A972);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:decrement {
  background-image: url(olive-green-scroll-up.svg);
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-button:vertical:increment {
  background-image: url(olive-green-scroll-down.svg);
}

}

  background-image: url(olive-green-scroll-right.svg);
}

input:not([type=button], [type=submit], [type=reset], [type=checkbox], [type=radio], [type=range]), textarea, .input,
select {
  border-color: #A4B97F;
}

.dropdown > select:not(:disabled):hover + .dropdown-button {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #C9D5AA, #C3D096);
  border-color: #9DAB77;
  box-shadow: -2px 0 #fff, inset 0 1px #DAE8B9, inset 1px 0 #DAE8B9, inset -1px 0 #DAE8B9;
}
.dropdown > select:not(:disabled):active + .dropdown-button {
  background-color: #99AC7C;
  background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #879770, transparent 3px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #879770, transparent 3px), linear-gradient(to left, #879770, transparent 3px);
  border-color: #768361;
  box-shadow: -2px 0 #fff;
}
.dropdown > .dropdown-button {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #A2B38D, #96A871);
  border-color: #8E997D;
  box-shadow: -2px 0 #fff, inset 0 1px #CBD7BA, inset 1px 0 #B6C7A2, inset -1px 0 #B6C7A2, inset 0 2px #B6C4A1;
}
.dropdown > .dropdown-button::after {
  background: #FFFFFF;
}

.progress-bar:not([aria-valuenow])::after,
.progress-bar > .progress-bar-value {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6666666667), transparent 50%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6666666667) 100%), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #E48245, #E48245 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}

progress::-webkit-progress-value {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6666666667), transparent 50%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6666666667) 100%), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #E48245, #E48245 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}

progress::-moz-progress-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6666666667), transparent 50%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6666666667) 100%), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #E48245, #E48245 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}

.list {
  border-color: #A4B97F;
}

.tabs > menu > button {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #FFFFF6, #F5F2E0);
  border-color: #A6A1A6;
}
.tabs > menu > button:hover {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #FFFFF6, #F5F2E0);
  border-top-color: #CF7225;
  box-shadow: inset 0 2px 0 #E39658;
}
.tabs > menu > button:hover::after {
  border: 0;
  box-shadow: none;
}
.tabs > menu > button[aria-selected=true] {
  border-top-color: #CF7225;
  box-shadow: inset 0 2px 0 #E39658;
}

.title-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #D4D7BB, #E0E1C3);
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px #F1F1DA, inset 0 2px #EDEBD3, inset 1px 0 #CBD1B7, inset 2px 0 #D4D9BC, inset -1px 0 #BFC5AE, inset -2px 0 #D3D9BC, inset 0 -1px #CBCEB6, inset 0 -2px #D3D6BA;
  border-color: #D7DBBD;
  border-right-color: #B2B6A5;
  border-left-color: #CAD1B7;
  color: #FFFFFF;
}

.window,
.dialog,
.menu {
  border-color: #B6BDAB;
  border-left-color: #C8D0B7;
  background: #D6D8BE;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px #C0C5B1, inset 1px 0 #D0D6BD, inset -2px -2px #D8DCC2, inset 2px 0 #E0E2C8;
}
.window.active, .window:focus-within, .window.menu,
.dialog.active,
.dialog:focus-within,
.dialog.menu,
.menu.active,
.menu:focus-within,
.menu.menu {
  border-color: #5E764F;
  border-left-color: #758D5E;
  background: #A4B27F;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px #899B6D, inset 1px 0 #8BA169, inset -2px -2px #BDC891, inset 2px 0 #ABBD85;
}

.window.active > .title-bar,
.window:focus-within > .title-bar,
.dialog.active > .title-bar,
.dialog:focus-within > .title-bar,
.title-bar.active,
.menu .title-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #C2CD95, #AAB883 6px, #ADBD85 50%, #C2CD95 80%, #C2CD95 90%, #BBC98F);
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px #EAF5C9, inset 0 2px #E0E7B8, inset -1px 0 #899B6D, inset -2px 0 #A8BD85, inset 1px 0 #8BA169, inset 2px 0 #AABA83, inset 0 -1px #96A867, inset 0 -2px #A3B27F;
  border-color: #8BA169;
  border-left-color: #8BA169;
  border-right-color: #5E764F;
}

.window.active > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.window:focus-within > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.dialog.active > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.dialog:focus-within > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.title-bar.active .title-bar-text {
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 #41400A;
}

.title-bar-buttons button, .title-bar-buttons button:active, .title-bar-buttons button:hover {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C7C7B4 0%, transparent 20%), linear-gradient(90deg, #AAB68F 0%, transparent 40%), linear-gradient(180deg, #AAB68F 0%, transparent 30%), linear-gradient(to bottom right, #8F9E6A, #7C8D4F);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px #96A577, inset -1px -1px #768753;
}
.title-bar-buttons button[data-close] {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E8B4A1 0%, transparent 20%), linear-gradient(90deg, #DB876C 0%, transparent 40%), linear-gradient(180deg, #DB876C 0%, transparent 30%), linear-gradient(to bottom right, #D57354, #CB4B16);
  box-shadow: inset 1px 1px #D36947, inset -1px -1px #9F3F1E, inset -2px -2px #C45024;
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-close]::after,
.title-bar-buttons button[data-minimize]::after,
.title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize]::after,
.maximized .title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize]::after {
  border: 0;
  box-shadow: none;
}
```

```scss
@use '../../../util/util';

:root {
  --desktop-bg: #9DACBD;

  --window-bg: #ECE9D8;

  --selection-bg: #93A070;
  --selection-inverse: #6C5F8F;
}

.top-panel, .bottom-panel {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #EAF5C9, #C2CD95 3px, #A8B680, #ADBD85 50%, #C2CD95, #BBC98F);
  box-shadow: inset 0 -1px #A7B680;
  border-top: 1px solid #8BA169;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #8BA169;
}

.left-panel, .right-panel {
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #EAF5C9, #C2CD95 3px, #A8B680, #ADBD85 50%, #C2CD95, #BBC98F);
  box-shadow: inset -1px 0 #A7B680;
  border-left: 1px solid #8BA169;
  border-right: 1px solid #8BA169;
}

legend {
  color: #99540A;
}

  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #FFFFF6, #F9F6E5, #F6F3E0);
  box-shadow: -1px -1px #ECEADA, 1px 1px #FAFAF6, inset 0 -1px #E2D0B6, inset -1px -2px #EBE0C8, inset -2px -3px #F3EEDB;

    background: #F6F2E9;

    &::after {
      border-top: 1px solid #C2D18F;

      border-bottom: 1px solid #A8A766;
      border-left: 2px solid #A0C767;

    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #FFFFF2, #F5F2E0);

    &::after {
      border-top: 1px solid #FCC595;
      border-right: 2px solid #EAB07D;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #CF7225;

    }

  &:focus-visible::after {

  }

  &:not(:disabled, .disabled):active, &.active {
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #EEE9D5, #ECE4CE);
    box-shadow: -1px -1px #ECEADA, 1px 1px #FAFAF6, inset 0 1px #DECCB2, inset 1px 2px #E7D9C3, inset 2px 3px #EADEC8, inset 0 -1px #F8F4E4, inset 0 -2px #F2ECD8;
  }
}

  & > button {
    border-color: #FAFAFA;

    box-shadow: 0 1px #83AB5A, 1px 0 #9BB181, inset 0 1px #CBD7BA, inset 1px 0 #B6C7A2, inset -1px 0 #B6C7A2, inset 0 2px #B6C4A1;

    &::after, &:active::after, &:hover::after {
      background: #FFFFFF;

      box-shadow: none;
    }

    &:not(:disabled, .disabled):hover, &.hover {
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #C9D5AA, #C3D096);

    }
  }

  & > .scrollbar-track > .scrollbar-thumb {
    box-shadow: 0 1px #8B9377, 1px 0 #829061, inset 1px 1px #8C9D73, inset -1px -1px #8C9D73, inset 2px 0 #ADBB9A;

    }

    }

    &:active {
      background: linear-gradient(to right, #9BAD82, #94A972);
    }
  }
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-button {
  &:vertical:decrement {
    background-image: url(olive-green-scroll-up.svg);
  }

  &:vertical:increment {
    background-image: url(olive-green-scroll-down.svg);
  }

    background-image: url(olive-green-scroll-left.svg);
  }

  &:horizontal:increment {
    background-image: url(olive-green-scroll-right.svg);
  }
}

    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #A2B38D, #96A871);
    border-color: #8E997D;
    box-shadow: -2px 0 #fff, inset 0 1px #CBD7BA, inset 1px 0 #B6C7A2, inset -1px 0 #B6C7A2, inset 0 2px #B6C4A1;

    &::after {
      background: #FFFFFF;
    }
  }
}

.progress-bar:not([aria-valuenow])::after,
.progress-bar > .progress-bar-value {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #fffa, transparent 50%, #fffa 100%), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #E48245, #E48245 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}

progress::-webkit-progress-value {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #fffa, transparent 50%, #fffa 100%), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #E48245, #E48245 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}

progress::-moz-progress-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #fffa, transparent 50%, #fffa 100%), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #E48245, #E48245 6px, transparent 6px, transparent 8px);
}

.list {
  border-color: #A4B97F;
}

.tabs {
  & > menu > button {
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #FFFFF6, #F5F2E0);
    border-color: #A6A1A6;

    &:hover {
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #FFFFF6, #F5F2E0);
      border-top-color: #CF7225;
      box-shadow: inset 0 2px 0 #E39658;

      &::after {
        border: 0;
        box-shadow: none;
      }
    }

    &[aria-selected="true"] {
      border-top-color: #CF7225;
      box-shadow: inset 0 2px 0 #E39658;
    }
  }
}

.title-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #D4D7BB, #E0E1C3);
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px #F1F1DA, inset 0 2px #EDEBD3, inset 1px 0 #CBD1B7, inset 2px 0 #D4D9BC, inset -1px 0 #BFC5AE, inset -2px 0 #D3D9BC, inset 0 -1px #CBCEB6, inset 0 -2px #D3D6BA;
  border-color: #D7DBBD;
  border-right-color: #B2B6A5;
  border-left-color: #CAD1B7;
  color: #FFFFFF;
}

.window,
.dialog,
.menu {
  border-color: #B6BDAB;
  border-left-color: #C8D0B7;
  background: #D6D8BE;
  box-shadow: inset -1px -1px #C0C5B1, inset 1px 0 #D0D6BD, inset -2px -2px #D8DCC2, inset 2px 0 #E0E2C8;

  &.active, &:focus-within, &.menu {
    border-color: #5E764F;
    border-left-color: #758D5E;
    background: #A4B27F;
    box-shadow: inset -1px -1px #899B6D, inset 1px 0 #8BA169, inset -2px -2px #BDC891, inset 2px 0 #ABBD85;
  }
}


.window.active > .title-bar,
.window:focus-within > .title-bar,
.dialog.active > .title-bar,
.dialog:focus-within > .title-bar,
.title-bar.active,
.menu .title-bar {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #C2CD95, #AAB883 6px, #ADBD85 50%, #C2CD95 80%, #C2CD95 90%, #BBC98F);
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px #EAF5C9, inset 0 2px #E0E7B8, inset -1px 0 #899B6D, inset -2px 0 #A8BD85, inset 1px 0 #8BA169, inset 2px 0 #AABA83, inset 0 -1px #96A867, inset 0 -2px #A3B27F;
  border-color: #8BA169;
  border-left-color: #8BA169;
  border-right-color: #5E764F;
}

.window.active > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.window:focus-within > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.dialog.active > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.dialog:focus-within > .title-bar .title-bar-text,
.title-bar.active .title-bar-text {
  text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 #41400A;
}

.title-bar-buttons button {
  &, &:active, &:hover {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C7C7B4 0%, transparent 20%),
      linear-gradient(90deg, #AAB68F 0%, transparent 40%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, #AAB68F 0%, transparent 30%),
      linear-gradient(to bottom right, #8F9E6A, #7C8D4F);
    box-shadow: inset 1px 1px #96A577, inset -1px -1px #768753;
  }

  &[data-close] {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E8B4A1 0%, transparent 20%),
      linear-gradient(90deg, #DB876C 0%, transparent 40%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, #DB876C 0%, transparent 30%),
      linear-gradient(to bottom right, #D57354, #CB4B16);
    box-shadow: inset 1px 1px #D36947, inset -1px -1px #9F3F1E, inset -2px -2px #C45024;
  }
}

.title-bar-buttons button[data-close]::after,
.title-bar-buttons button[data-minimize]::after,
.title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize]::after,
.maximized .title-bar-buttons button[data-maximize]::after {
  border: 0;
  box-shadow: none;
}

```

```css
.title-bar-buttons button {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #FFFFFF, #E9E8F1 3px, #E0DFEA 3px, #A7A8C2);
```
